creator: uffe@uffe.org
text:
Hi,

If it is ok with you I'll pick some of your changes - and incorporate them into nullmailer over time.
But for now I think that the dust needs to settle a bit because I'd had lots of angry users complaining over the recent problems with nullmailer. I was not notified of the faulty change - and hence did not have a change to review it.
It took a week before i discovered that someone had changes in the port that I maintain... hmm
